name: Redfin Estimate Checker
tagline: Find out if a home's digital estimate matches what buyers are actually paying.
description: Redfin's algorithm can lag the real market by months or even years. This skill looks up what Redfin thought a home was worth at the exact moment it sold and compares that to the actual sale price — so you can see how accurate (or how off) the estimate really was before you make an offer.
whoFor: Home buyers and investors who want to know whether a listing price reflects what the market is actually doing — not what an algorithm guessed six months ago.
useCommandHint: Have the Redfin listing open in your Chrome browser, then type this in Claude:
useCommand: Check the Redfin estimate on this listing
requirements: Claude desktop app with Cowork mode enabled, plus the Claude in Chrome extension installed and active in your Chrome browser.
